title: Proclamation No. 697, s. 1970
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 697

RESERVING FOR SETTLEMENT PURPOSES OF THE NATIONAL CULTURAL MINORITIES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BANGA, KIAMBA AND SURALLAH PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for settlement purposes of the National Cultural Minorities, subject to private rights, if any there be, to future classification and survey and to the provisions for Executive Order No. 113, series of 1955, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the municipalities of Banga, Kiamba and Surallah, province of South Cotabato, island of Mindanao, containing an area of five thousand two hundred twenty four (5,224) hectares, more or less, and more particularly described as follows:

beginning at a point marked “1” proposed Tagabili reservation which is a ficus spike, 25 m. to LC L 67/12;

thence S. 37 E. 250 m. to point 2; thence S. 37 E. 275 m. to point 3; thence S. 44 E. 200 m. to point 4; thence S. 81 E. 250 m. to point 5; thence S. 49 E. 250 m. to point 6; thence S. 88 E. 275 m. to point 7; thence N. 57 E. 300 m. to point 8; thence S. 35 E. 200 m. to point 9; thence N. 31 E. 200 m. to point 10; thence N. 12 E. 250 m. to point 11; thence N. 33 E. 250 m. to point 12; thence Ambaluc Creek dstm . NW dir ., to point 13; thence N. 67 F. 350 m. to point 14; thence N. 27 W. 300 m. to point 15; thence N. 2 W 250 m to point 16; thence N. 2 W 150 m. to point 17; thence N. 40 W. 300 m. to point 18; thence N. 38 W. 325 m. to point 19; thence N. 3?? W. 250 m. to point 20; thence Bang?? R dstm F. 38 E. 340 m to point 21; thence D-E 1,060 m. to point 22; thence S. 19 E. 2,170 m. to point 23; thence S. 42 E. 300 m. to point 24; thence D-E 300 m. to point 25; thence S. 53 W. 350 m. to point 26; thence S. 58 E. 400 m. to point 27; thence S. 43 E. 550 m. to point 28; thence S. 47 E. 808 m. to point 29; thence S. 15 E. 709 m. to point 30; thence S. 69 E. 420 m. to point 31; thence N. 74 E. 260 m. to point 32; thence S, 50 E. 620 m. to point 33; thence S. 79 W. 1,150 m. to point 34; thence S. 79 W. 935 m. to point 35; thence N. 79 W. 1,050 m. to point 36; thence N. 79 W. 1,141 m. to point 37; thence S. 53 W. 1,276 m. to point 38; thence S, 34 W. 880 m. to point 39; thence Limla crk . NWS & SW Drct to point 40: 2,900 m thence Jolooc crk upstm . SE & NE 2,040 m. 41; thence S, 17 W. 1,300 m. to point 42; thence S. 49 W. 1,580 m. to point 43; thence S. 49 W. 500 m. to point 44; thence N. 38 W. 391 m. to point 45; thence S. 67 W. 96 m. to point 46; thence N. 50 W. 264 m. to point 47; thence N. 31 W. 208 m. to point 48; thence N. 51 E. 159 m. to point 49; thence N. 32 W. 301 m. to point 50; thence N. 26 W. 350 m. to point 51; thence N. 21 W. 360 m. to point 52; thence N. 25 W. 301 m. to point 53; thence N. 30 W. 300 m. to point 54; thence N. 26 W. 198 m. to point 55; thence N. 66 W. 251 m. to point 56; thence N. 58 W. 387 m. to point 57; thence N. 66 W. 149 m. to point 58; thence N. 68 W. 180 m. to point 59; thence N. 68 W. 249 m. to point 60; thence N. 85 W. 690 m. to point 61; thence N. 13 E. 70 m. to point 62; thence N. 10 E. 290 m. to point 63; thence D-N 200 m. to point 64; thence N. 15 E. 260 m. to point 65; thence N. 31 E. 160 m. to point 66; thence N. 14 E. 70 m. to point 67; thence D-E 790 m. to point 68; thence N. 75 W. 300 m. to point 69; thence N. 68 W. 220 m. to point 70; thence N. 51 W. 250 m. to point 71; thence N. 55 W. 190 m. to point 72; thence N. 69 E. 1,020 m. to point 73; thence N. 49 E. 700 m. to point 74; thence N. 40 W. 480 m. to point 75; thence N. 48 W. 300 m. to point 76; thence N. 22 E. 240 m. to point 77; thence N. 44 W. 730 m. to point 78; thence N. 20 E. 1,830 m. to point 79; thence N. 30 W. 2,220 m. to the point of beginning;

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 9th day June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President Republic of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) ALEJANDRO MELCHOR Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
